positive: A stylized, minimalist geometric scene featuring a collection of interconnected celestial bodies: crescent moons, abstract star trails, and stylized constellations, rendered in a clean linework style. The primary palette should be deep indigo, muted gold, and crisp off-white. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a repeating apparel pattern. Use strong, graphic silhouettes and high contrast to achieve a dramatic, dreamy feel. Incorporate subtle mandalas or sacred geometry elements to enhance the cosmic feeling. Studio lighting, vector art quality, perfect symmetry, designed for screen printing.
